svg.title: UML Object Diagram – COEP System Runtime Snapshot
svg.desc: Runtime object instances showing a student enrolled in a course, submitting an assignment, filling an exam form, and receiving a result.
svg.text: Objects represent a snapshot of the system during a student's exam form submission
objectName : ClassName (underlined header) | No methods shown | Dashed links = runtime associations
Snapshot scenario: Student Arjun Mehta (s1) is enrolled in Data Structures (c1), submitted assignment (sub1),
filled exam form (ef1 — APPROVED by ec1), received result grade BB, and attempted quiz q1 twice.
